# DOThtml
> A lightweight, reactive UI engine and framework for building modern web applications with zero dependencies.

## Core Documentation
- [Quick Start](https://dothtml.org/docs/quick-start.md): Get up and running with DOThtml in minutes.
- [Installation](https://dothtml.org/docs/get-dot.md): Guide on how to add DOThtml to your project.
- [Main Features](https://dothtml.org/docs/main-features.md): Overview of components, reactivity, and event handling.

## Deep Dives
- [Detailed Features](https://dothtml.org/docs/detailed-features.md): Comprehensive breakdown of the framework's capabilities.
- [Hero Features](https://dothtml.org/docs/hero-features.md): Key highlights and unique selling points.
- [Learn More](https://dothtml.org/docs/learn-more.md): Additional resources for mastering DOThtml.

## Community
- [Contribute](https://dothtml.org/docs/contribute.md): Information on how to report bugs and contribute to the project.
